title: Part 3: Chapter 8 - Periodic Education Certifications
description: This article is about the periodic education certifications with sections covering VA Form 22-6553 the Verification of Pursuit of Course Leading to a Standard College Degree, VA Form 22-8979 Student Verification of Enrollment, Processing Enrollment Changes Reported by Student, VA Form 22-6553b Certification of Lessons Completed, VA Form22-6553c, Monthly Certification of Flight Training, Vaform 22-6553d, Monthly Certification of On-the-Job and Apprenticeship Training, Periodic Education Certification Not obtainable, Excessive Rate Lines, Alternative means for Submitting Verifications or Certifications and Termination Verifications or Certifications.
keywords: cert, school, degree, benefit, education, certification, entrance, OJT, correspondence, flight, training
